hero.subtitle: BizIci connects customers with neighborhood shops — products, stock, prices, and live chat with the shopkeeper.

feat.title: Everything you need to shop local
feat.subtitle: One app to discover, chat and book with the shops around you.
feat.searchBody: Snap a photo of a product and find it instantly in nearby shops.
feat.mapBody: See the shops around you and what they have in stock, right now.
feat.chatBody: Chat live with the shopkeeper, ask your questions, reserve an item.
feat.bookBody: Book a service in seconds, straight from the app.

showcase.title: Talk to the shopkeeper, not a bot
showcase.body: A question about a product, availability, or opening hours? Chat directly with the shop and book without calling.
showcase.b2: Reserve a product or appointment inside the chat

twosided.title: Two apps, one neighborhood
twosided.subtitle: Whether you're buying or selling, BizIci brings locals and shops closer.
twosided.customerBody: Discover, request, chat and buy from the shops near you — effortlessly.
twosided.sellerBody: Manage your stock, prices and customers, and grow your local visibility with BizIci Pro.

mock.msgIn: Hi! Yes, I have two left 🥖

finalCta.title: Your neighborhood is waiting.
finalCta.subtitle: Join BizIci and rediscover the joy of shopping local.

how.customerBody: Download the BizIci app to discover shops near you, request a product and chat with the seller.
how.sellerBody: The BizIci Pro app lets you manage your stock, your prices, and reply to customers in real time.
how.trustBody: No middleman. You talk directly to the shopkeeper next to you, and pay in store.

download.title: Coming soon
download.subtitle: BizIci is launching soon on the App Store and Google Play.

legal.contactBody: For any request regarding your personal data or these terms, please write to

deletion.title: Account deletion request
deletion.intro: You can request the deletion of your BizIci account (customer) or BizIci Pro account (seller) by filling out this form. Our team will process your request within 30 days at most and will contact you at the email address provided to confirm.
deletion.after1: Your profile, messages and preferences are permanently deleted.
deletion.after2: If you are a seller, your shop and products are also removed from the app.
deletion.after3: Some information may be retained for legal reasons (invoices, security logs) for up to 5 years.
deletion.email: Email address tied to your account
deletion.emailHint: Use the same email as your BizIci account.
deletion.accountTypeBoth: Both (I use BizIci as customer AND seller)
deletion.confirm: I confirm I understand that deletion is permanent and that I will no longer be able to access my account or recover my data.
deletion.errorName: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
deletion.errorEmail: Please enter the email address tied to your account.
deletion.errorConfirm: You must confirm that you understand the consequences of deletion.
deletion.errorRateLimit: Too many requests sent from this address. Try again in about {{minutes}} minute(s).
deletion.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
deletion.successBody: Thank you, your deletion request has been recorded. Our team will process it within 30 days at most and you will receive a confirmation email at the address provided.
deletion.successContact: If you change your mind before deletion, write to us at

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you requested doesn't exist or has been moved.
